name: Rogz Dog Utility Side Release Collar XX-Large - Red
shortDescription: Keep every walk safe and stylish with the Rogz Utility Side Release Reflective Dog Collar crafted with reflective stitching for enhanced nighttime visibility and a secure RogLoc buckle designed for dependable, worry-free outings. Rogz Utility Side Release collar – XX-Large Red
description: Rogz Utility Side Release Reflective Dog Collar has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for nighttime visibility RogLoc: The Fort Knox of release buckles Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-Cast Ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: XX-Large 40mm (Neck Size: 60 - 70cm)
